image_prompt: Create a premium editorial hero image for AI Tool Pick's review of Wispr Flow. The image must visibly include the actual product name and actual tool name 'Wispr Flow' on a laptop or app interface. Make it recognisably about this exact product, not a generic AI dashboard. Show the product-specific concept: AI voice dictation and speech-to-text workflow with the Wispr Flow product name visible. Use the site's premium dark, cream and orange visual style, realistic SaaS dashboard details, clean composition, no generic abstract blobs, no random brand names.
